text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳 U.S. President Trump said China can send its ships to the United States or to Venezuela. “We told them, buy from Venezuela. We have a lot of overcapacity, we’d sell them, and we’ll probably sell it for even less money.” Trump added that he has a…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said that if China supplies military equipment to Iran, including shoulder‑fired anti‑aircraft missiles, it would face a 50% tariff on its products. “If we catch them doing that, they get a 50% tariff, which is a staggering amount,” he said. Trump added that he doubts China would do so because of his relationship with President Xi. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳 美国总统特朗普表示，中国可以将其船只派往美国或委内瑞拉。‘我们告诉他们，从委内瑞拉购买。我们有大量的过剩产能，我们会卖给他们，而且价格可能还会更低。’特朗普补充说，他有一个……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，如果中国向伊朗提供军事装备，包括肩扛式防空导弹，其产品将面临50%的关税。他说：“如果我们抓到他们这样做，他们将面临50%的关税，这是一个惊人的数字。”特朗普补充说，由于他与习近平主席的关系，他怀疑中国会这样做。@wfwitness

text: Trump on gas and oil prices: Eventually, prices will go down. It may not happen immediately, but once this situation is resolved, prices will fall. If you want to see the stock market collapse, let a couple of nuclear bombs be used — whether against us or anywhere else.
text_zh: 特朗普谈油气价格：最终，价格会下降。这可能不会立即发生，但一旦这种情况得到解决，价格就会下跌。如果你想看到股市崩盘，那就让几枚核弹被使用吧——无论是针对我们还是其他任何地方。

text: Journalist Jad Ghosn: "There are Lebanese political parties who wouldn't mind even a slight loss of land if Israel gets rid of Hezbullah for them..."
text_zh: 记者 Jad Ghosn：“有些黎巴嫩政党甚至不介意失去一点土地，只要以色列能为他们除掉真主党……”

text: Trump: The Strait is critical for Japan — they get about 93% of their oil through it. South Korea gets roughly 45%. Yet these countries haven’t really helped us. I ask them: are you going to help? We have about 45,000 U.S. troops in Japan and about 50,000 in South Korea. We guard them and protect them. But when we ask for a little help in return, they don’t help us.
text_zh: 特朗普：霍尔木兹海峡对日本至关重要——他们约93%的石油通过该海峡运输。韩国约占45%。然而，这些国家并没有真正帮助我们。我问他们：你们会帮忙吗？我们在日本有大约45,000名美军，在韩国有大约50,000名。我们守护并保护他们。但当我们要求一点回报时，他们却不帮助我们。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said the United States must stop Iran from obtaining a nuclear weapon. “You want to see a stock market go down? Let a couple of nuclear bombs be dropped on us, or frankly, any place else,” he warned. He noted that the stock market…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 U.S. President Trump said China can send its ships to the United States or to Venezuela. “We told them, buy from Venezuela. We have a lot of overcapacity, we’d sell them, and we’ll probably sell it for even less money.” Trump added that he has a very good relationship with President Xi and that “they’re paying us substantial money – we’ve never got money before.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，美国必须阻止伊朗获得核武器。‘你想看到股市下跌吗？让几枚核弹投向我们，或者坦率地说，投向任何其他地方，’他警告说。他指出，股市……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 美国总统特朗普表示，中国可以将其船只派往美国或委内瑞拉。‘我们告诉他们，从委内瑞拉购买。我们有大量的过剩产能，我们会卖给他们，而且价格可能还会更低。’特朗普补充说，他与习近平主席关系非常好，而且‘他们正在支付给我们大量的钱——我们以前从未得到过钱。’ @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Bartiromo: Do you believe the price of oil and gas will be lower before the midterm elections? Trump: I hope so. I mean, I think so, it could be. It could be the same or maybe a little bit higher. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043338662876717084/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 Bartiromo：你认为油气价格会在中期选举前走低吗？特朗普：我希望如此。我的意思是，我认为会，有可能。也可能保持不变，或者稍微高一点。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043338662876717084/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel MUST WATCH 🔴 President Trump on Iran: “They haven’t left the bargaining table. I predict they come back and they give us everything we want. I want everything. I don’t want 90%, I don’t want 95%. I told my people I want everything!” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043338231240859898/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 必看 🔴 特朗普总统谈伊朗：“他们还没有离开谈判桌。我预测他们会回来，并给我们想要的一切。我想要一切。我不想要90%，我不想要95%。我告诉我的团队，我想要一切！” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043338231240859898/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NOW 🔴 PRESIDENT TRUMP: “IF I CATCH CHINA GIVING IRAN ARMS, IT'D GET 50% TARIFF” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 现在 🔴 特朗普总统：“如果我抓到中国向伊朗提供武器，将面临50%的关税” 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump: "In one half of a day, they wouldn't have ONE bridge standing. They wouldn't have ONE electric generating plant standing. And they're back in the stone ages. I'd rather not do that!" "But I do believe they're going to come to the table on this because nobody can be so stupid as to say that we want to have nuclear weapons." "I could take out Iran in one day. I could take down in one in one hour." "I could have their entire energy, everything, every one of their plants, their electric generating plants, which is a big deal." "And I hate to do it because if I do it, it takes you 10 years to rebuild. They'll never be able to rebuild it." "And the other thing you take out of the bridges. I took out one just to show them because they went public with a statement that wasn't true. They admitted it." "I say, I'm going to take out a bridge. And I took out a bridge. And that was the end of that. Now they've been really behaving quite well." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普总统：“在半天之内，他们就不会有一座桥梁屹立不倒。他们就不会有一座发电厂屹立不倒。他们会回到石器时代。我宁愿不这样做！” “但我确实相信他们会就此坐到谈判桌前，因为没有人会愚蠢到说我们想要拥有核武器。” “我可以在一天内消灭伊朗。我可以在一小时内将其摧毁。” “我可以摧毁他们的整个能源，一切，他们的每一座工厂，他们的发电厂，这可是件大事。” “我不想这样做，因为如果我做了，他们需要10年才能重建。他们永远无法重建它。” “还有就是摧毁桥梁。我摧毁了一座，只是为了向他们展示，因为他们公开发表了一份不真实的声明。他们承认了这一点。” “我说，我要摧毁一座桥。然后我就摧毁了一座桥。事情就这样结束了。现在他们表现得非常好。” 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump: "If we find that China is giving [Iran] anti-aircraft missiles... we are going to tariff them 50%." tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普：“如果我们发现中国正在向[伊朗]提供防空导弹……我们将对他们征收50%的关税。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump: “We have new machinery to kill the drones, the computerized bullets, they call that. Also lasers melt the drone; it’s a beautiful thing to see.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043336914191679741/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普总统：“我们有新的机器来摧毁无人机，他们称之为计算机化子弹。还有激光可以熔化无人机；这真是一件美妙的事情。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043336914191679741/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 🗳️ 🗣️ Péter Magyar said that the entire Tisza community and millions of supporters are calmly and confidently waiting for polling stations to close. 📌 He stated that turnout data throughout the day confirms what they already knew, calling the election a historic moment for Hungary. 📌 Magyar dismissed claims of potential post-election unrest as fear-driven narratives and falsehoods promoted by Fidesz, even suggesting such ideas resemble influence from Russian consultants. 📌 He described these reports as desperate provocations and misinformation. 📌 Addressing citizens, he said the country is living through the final hours of Orbán’s rule and urged people to move forward with calm and dignity, aiming to reunite the nation afterward. 📌 He called on those who haven’t yet voted to go to polling stations before 19:00 and encourage others to participate, stressing that every vote matters. 📌 “God bless Hungary!” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 ： 🇭🇺 🗳️ 🗣️ Péter Magyar 表示，整个 Tisza 社区和数百万支持者正冷静而自信地等待投票站关闭。 📌 他指出，全天的投票率数据证实了他们已经知道的情况，称这次选举对匈牙利来说是一个历史性时刻。 📌 Magyar 驳斥了关于选举后可能出现动荡的说法，称其为青民盟（Fidesz）散布的恐惧驱动的叙事和谎言，甚至暗示这些想法类似于俄罗斯顾问的影响。 📌 他将这些报道描述为绝望的挑衅和虚假信息。 📌 他向公民发表讲话，称国家正在经历欧尔班统治的最后几个小时，并敦促人们冷静而有尊严地前进，旨在之后实现国家统一。 📌 他呼吁那些尚未投票的人在19:00之前前往投票站并鼓励他人参与，强调每一票都很重要。 📌 “上帝保佑匈牙利！” 与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel REPORTER: If they don't agree, is that the plan? Will you further destruct Iran? TRUMP: "YEAH, I will. If they don't give that plan up, yeah!" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043336355715899759/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 记者：如果他们不同意，这就是计划吗？你会进一步摧毁伊朗吗？特朗普：“是的，我会。如果他们不放弃那个计划，是的！” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043336355715899759/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump: "I was thinking about calling it the Gulf of Trump, and I decided not to do it. I think that one maybe wouldn't have worked out. I'm not so sure. But I was thinking about it's gonna be called the Gulf of Trump." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043335761244692859/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普总统：“我曾考虑将其称为特朗普湾，但我决定不这样做。我想那个可能行不通。我不太确定。但我曾想过它会被称为特朗普湾。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043335761244692859/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: Social media post about wiping out Iranian civilization brought Iran to the table. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：关于消灭伊朗文明的社交媒体帖子让伊朗回到了谈判桌前。 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump on Iran's nuclear program: "You want to see a stock market that goes down, let a couple of nuclear bombs get dropped on us." tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 特朗普谈伊朗核计划：“你想看到股市下跌吗？让几枚核弹投向我们吧。” 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Iranian state media releases footage of Iranian navy servicemen engaging in radio communications with the U.S. Navy Arleigh Burke-class destroyer USS Frank E. Petersen Jr. while it is sailing through the Strait of Hormuz. An Iranian serviceman issues what is meant to be the "last warning" to the warship and later says that it ready to open fire on it, though no kinetic action of any kind is seen in the video. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）伊朗官方媒体发布了伊朗海军人员在霍尔木兹海峡航行时，与美国海军阿利·伯克级驱逐舰“弗兰克·E·彼得森”号（USS Frank E. Petersen Jr.）进行无线电通信的视频。一名伊朗军人向军舰发出了所谓的“最后警告”，随后表示准备向其开火，尽管视频中没有看到任何形式的动能行动。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: “won’t let Iran make money selling oil to those it likes” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：“不会让伊朗通过向其喜欢的人出售石油来赚钱” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump on Iran: "They came in like they had the cards, but they don't have the cards. Their army and their whole military is obliterated. The whole place is obliterated." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043335164776813057/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普谈伊朗：“他们进来时好像手里有牌，但他们根本没有牌。他们的军队和整个军事力量都被摧毁了。整个地方都被摧毁了。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043335164776813057/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: As Bibi Netanyahu said, we're the big brother and they're the small brother. It's been a very effective team. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043334836337705308/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普：正如比比·内塔尼亚胡所说，我们是大哥，他们是小弟。这是一个非常有效的团队。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043334836337705308/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel SUDAN: Human Rights Watch reports that Sudanese Armed Forces and allied units are carrying out widespread arbitrary detentions, torture, and abuse of civilians in areas under their control, actions that may amount to war crimes. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043334747334603028/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 苏丹：人权观察组织报告称，苏丹武装部队及其盟军正在其控制区对平民进行广泛的任意拘留、酷刑和虐待，这些行为可能构成战争罪。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043334747334603028/photo/1 推文

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 I could take out Iran in ONE DAY. In ONE HOUR but I HATE TO DO IT
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 我可以在一天内消灭伊朗。在一小时内，但我不想这样做

text: Trump on the Gulf of Mexico: I was thinking about calling it the Gulf of Trump, and I decided not to do it. I think that one maybe wouldn't have worked out.
text_zh: 特朗普谈墨西哥湾：我曾考虑将其称为特朗普湾，但我决定不这样做。我想那个可能行不通。

text: 🇵🇸 Israel’s Minister of National Security, Ben-Gvir, is once again pouring oil on the fire: the politician carried out a religious ritual right in the inner courtyard of the Al-Aqsa Mosque, which has been closed to Muslims for more than 40 days. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇵🇸 以色列国家安全部长本-格维尔再次火上浇油：这位政客在阿克萨清真寺的内院进行了一场宗教仪式，该清真寺已对穆斯林关闭了40多天。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Bint Jbeil is under extreme pressure and it is unclear how long it'll last Dozens of Israeli drones, jets are active over the small towns with thousands of soldiers supported by artillery and field intelligence units are operating. Its a very harsh battle
text_zh: 宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）正处于极度压力之下，尚不清楚这种情况会持续多久。数十架以色列无人机和喷气式飞机在小镇上空活动，数千名士兵在炮兵和野战情报部队的支持下进行行动。这是一场非常残酷的战斗

text: Maria Bartiromo: If they do not give up the nuclear effort, Will you further destruct Iran? Trump: Yeah, I will.
text_zh: Maria Bartiromo：如果他们不放弃核计划，你会进一步摧毁伊朗吗？特朗普：是的，我会。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump said oil and gas prices will eventually go down “when this is all over”. He noted that the Dow hit 50,000 and the S&P 500 hit 7,000 in his first year. “I’ve got to stop this country from having a nuclear weapon,” he said, adding…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said the United States must stop Iran from obtaining a nuclear weapon. “You want to see a stock market go down? Let a couple of nuclear bombs be dropped on us, or frankly, any place else,” he warned. He noted that the stock market has fallen much less than he expected and gas prices have not risen as much as he thought. Trump described Iran’s late Supreme Leader Khomeini as a “maniac” and said his economic advisors agreed that the US had to “take a little journey down to Iran” to stop its nuclear programme. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普表示，油气价格最终会在‘这一切结束时’下降。他指出，道琼斯指数在他执政的第一年达到了50,000点，标普500指数达到了7,000点。‘我必须阻止这个国家拥有核武器，’他说，并补充说……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，美国必须阻止伊朗获得核武器。‘你想看到股市下跌吗？让几枚核弹投向我们，或者坦率地说，投向任何其他地方，’他警告说。他指出，股市的跌幅比他预期的要小得多，油价也没有他想象的涨得那么多。特朗普称伊朗已故最高领袖霍梅尼为“疯子”，并表示他的经济顾问同意美国必须“去伊朗走一趟”以阻止其核计划。 @wfwitness

text: Trump: I could take out Iran in one day.
text_zh: 特朗普：我可以在一天内消灭伊朗。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump joked that he considered renaming the Strait of Hormuz to the “Gulf of Trump” but decided against it. “I think maybe it was a wise—I think that one maybe wouldn’t have worked out,” he said, adding that he was kidding. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump said oil and gas prices will eventually go down “when this is all over”. He noted that the Dow hit 50,000 and the S&P 500 hit 7,000 in his first year. “I’ve got to stop this country from having a nuclear weapon,” he said, adding that gas prices have not risen as much as he expected. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普开玩笑说，他曾考虑将霍尔木兹海峡更名为‘特朗普湾’，但最终放弃了。‘我想这可能是一个明智的——我想那个可能行不通，’他说，并补充说他是在开玩笑。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普表示，油气价格最终会在‘这一切结束时’下降。他指出，道琼斯指数在他执政的第一年达到了50,000点，标普500指数达到了7,000点。‘我必须阻止这个国家拥有核武器，’他说，并补充说油价并没有他预期的涨得那么多。 @wfwitness

text: Trump: They haven’t left the bargaining table. I predict they come back and they give us everything we want. I want everything. I don’t want 90%, I don’t want 95%. I want everything!
text_zh: 特朗普：他们还没有离开谈判桌。我预测他们会回来，并给我们想要的一切。我想要一切。我不想要90%，我不想要95%。我想要一切！

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said Iran is “getting killed” and that he could take out the country in one day. “I could take out, in one hour, I could have their entire energy, everything, every one of their plants, their electric generating plants,” he said…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump joked that he considered renaming the Strait of Hormuz to the “Gulf of Trump” but decided against it. “I think maybe it was a wise—I think that one maybe wouldn’t have worked out,” he said, adding that he was kidding. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗正在‘被摧毁’，他可以在一天内消灭这个国家。‘我可以在一小时内，我可以摧毁他们的整个能源，一切，他们的每一座工厂，他们的发电厂，’他说……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普开玩笑说，他曾考虑将霍尔木兹海峡更名为‘特朗普湾’，但最终放弃了。‘我想这可能是一个明智的——我想那个可能行不通，’他说，并补充说他是在开玩笑。 @wfwitness

text: Nabatieh near Nabih Berri avenue
text_zh: 纳巴泰（Nabatieh）靠近纳比·贝里（Nabih Berri）大道

text: Trump: The people we dealt with yesterday were, frankly, very smart, very sharp, very good.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们昨天打交道的人，坦率地说，非常聪明，非常敏锐，非常好。

text: The beautiful Mansouri town under Jewish phosphorus attacks
text_zh: 美丽的曼苏里（Mansouri）镇正遭受犹太人的磷弹袭击

text: 🇺🇸 "I could take out Iran in one day. In one hour, I could have their entire energy, everything, every one of their electric generating plants, which is a big deal. I hate to do it because if I do it, it takes you 10 years to rebuild. They'll never be able to. And the other thing you take out are their bridges. I took out one just to show them." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “我可以在一天内消灭伊朗。在一小时内，我可以摧毁他们的整个能源，一切，他们的每一座发电厂，这可是件大事。我不想这样做，因为如果我做了，他们需要10年才能重建。他们永远无法重建。还有就是摧毁桥梁。我摧毁了一座，只是为了向他们展示。” - 特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: DON TZU'S ART OF THE DEAL
text_zh: 唐·特朗普的交易艺术

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ - "I was thinking about calling it the Gulf of Trump, and I decided not to do it. I think that one maybe wouldn't have worked out. I'm not so sure. But I was thinking about it's gonna be called the Gulf of Trump." - President Trump on Fox News.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ⚡️ - “我曾考虑将其称为特朗普湾，但我决定不这样做。我想那个可能行不通。我不太确定。但我曾想过它会被称为特朗普湾。” - 特朗普总统在福克斯新闻上说。

text: 🇺🇸 ❌ 🇮🇷 — President Trump: Nobody can be so stupid as to say that we want to have nuclear weapons and they have no cards. Bartiromo: If they do not give up that effort, Will you further destruct Iran? Trump: Yeah, I will.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ❌ 🇮🇷 — 特朗普总统：没有人会愚蠢到说我们想要拥有核武器，而他们手里根本没有牌。Bartiromo：如果他们不放弃那种努力，你会进一步摧毁伊朗吗？特朗普：是的，我会。

text: 📢 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump: "We didn't get there on the important issue. They want to have nuclear weapons. They're not going to have nuclear weapons." ✍ Analysis on the channel has been very few lately due to personal stressing matters and no time, but the nuclear case here is Iranians giving Trump a carrot and a stick Be very stringy and not willing to compromise on a topic you can easily compromise on like in 2015 and make it the center piece for Trump's full focus Then make it sound like a tremendous breakthrough by giving him what he obsessed over and everything you wanted actually to be achieved The Hormoz will eventually open and the enriched material can be shipped to Russia. Very easy and so, let him obsses Lifting sanctions on Iranian oil and stop selling discounted oil to China will give Iran 2-3x more profit and revenue than a toll of 1$ per barrel for any ship passing by.
text_zh: 📢 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普：“我们在重要问题上没有达成一致。他们想要拥有核武器。他们不会拥有核武器。” ✍ 频道最近的分析很少，因为个人压力大且没有时间，但这里的核问题是伊朗人给特朗普的一根胡萝卜和一根大棒。在像2015年那样可以轻易妥协的话题上表现得非常吝啬且不愿妥协，并使其成为特朗普全神贯注的中心。然后通过给他他所痴迷的东西和你实际上想要实现的一切，使其听起来像是一个巨大的突破。霍尔木兹海峡最终会开放，浓缩材料可以运往俄罗斯。非常容易，所以，让他痴迷吧。解除对伊朗石油的制裁并停止向中国出售打折石油，将使伊朗获得的利润和收入比对每艘通过的船只征收1美元的通行费多出2-3倍。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump defended his “a whole civilisation will die tonight” tweet, saying: “I’m fine with it. That statement brought them to the table.” He noted that Iran has been allowed to say “death to America” for years. “What I’m referring…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said Iran is “getting killed” and that he could take out the country in one day. “I could take out, in one hour, I could have their entire energy, everything, every one of their plants, their electric generating plants,” he said, adding that he would also destroy all of Iran’s bridges. “In one half of a day, they wouldn’t have one bridge standing, they wouldn’t have one electric generating plant standing, and they’re back in the stone ages.” Trump said he believes Iran will come to the table because “they have no cards whatsoever.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普为他‘今晚整个文明将消亡’的推文辩护，称：‘我对此没意见。那份声明让他们回到了谈判桌前。’他指出，伊朗多年来一直被允许说‘打倒美国’。‘我指的是……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗正在‘被摧毁’，他可以在一天内消灭这个国家。‘我可以在一小时内，我可以摧毁他们的整个能源，一切，他们的每一座工厂，他们的发电厂，’他说，并补充说他还会摧毁伊朗所有的桥梁。‘在半天之内，他们就不会有一座桥梁屹立不倒，他们就不会有一座发电厂屹立不倒，他们会回到石器时代。’特朗普表示，他相信伊朗会回到谈判桌前，因为‘他们根本没有任何牌。’ @wfwitness

text: Trump: The The New York Times is a fake paper. Just believe the opposite. It’s so sad when you look at CNN, The New York Times, ABC fake news, NBC fake news—it’s so sad to see it. They report things they know are false. It’s almost treasonous, actually, if you want to really know the truth. It’s almost treasonous.
text_zh: 特朗普：《纽约时报》是一份虚假报纸。只要相信相反的就行了。当你看到CNN、《纽约时报》、ABC假新闻、NBC假新闻时，真是太可悲了——看到这些真是太可悲了。他们报道他们明知是虚假的事情。如果你真的想知道真相，这实际上几乎是叛国。这几乎是叛国。

text: Trump: As Bibi Netanyahu said, we’re the big brother and they’re the small brother.
text_zh: 特朗普：正如比比·内塔尼亚胡所说，我们是大哥，他们是小弟。

text: From the massacre in Maaroub, where only women and children were killed. A full neighborhood was attacked. This is how Israel attacks towns. The martyrs are all still under rubble
text_zh: 来自马鲁布（Maaroub）的大屠杀，那里只有妇女和儿童被杀害。整个社区遭到了袭击。这就是以色列袭击城镇的方式。烈士们仍然埋在废墟下

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump warned that if Iran obtained a nuclear weapon: "They would use it on Israel. And one weapon would do damage like nobody’s ever seen. Wipe it out, conceivably. They don’t need more than one. Then they’d go after the Middle East…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump defended his “a whole civilisation will die tonight” tweet, saying: “I’m fine with it. That statement brought them to the table.” He noted that Iran has been allowed to say “death to America” for years. “What I’m referring to is their military will be totally gone. It’s pretty much gone now. Their navy is gone. Their air force is gone. 158 ships are at the bottom of the sea.” Trump added: “They have no cards. I predict they come back and they give us everything we want. I don’t want 90 percent. I don’t want 95 percent. I want everything.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普警告说，如果伊朗获得核武器：‘他们会把它用在以色列身上。一枚武器造成的破坏将是前所未见的。可以想象，它会将其抹去。他们不需要超过一枚。然后他们会去对付中东……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普为他‘今晚整个文明将消亡’的推文辩护，称：‘我对此没意见。那份声明让他们回到了谈判桌前。’他指出，伊朗多年来一直被允许说‘打倒美国’。‘我指的是他们的军队将彻底消失。现在基本上已经消失了。他们的海军没了。他们的空军没了。158艘船沉在海底。’特朗普补充说：‘他们没有牌。我预测他们会回来，并给我们想要的一切。我不想要90%。我不想要95%。我想要一切。’ @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from НЕРЫБАРЬ: ↩️ Reply to ОРИЕНТАРЬ: "📝Вы заблокировали Ормуз?📝Нет, это мы заблокировали его!"
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 НЕРЫБАРЬ： ↩️ 回复 ОРИЕНТАРЬ：“📝你们封锁了霍尔木兹海峡吗？📝不，是我们封锁了它！”

text: In Lebanon still the same, Israeli attack and massacres continue The Israeli army advanced to Bint Jbeil hospital area and has deepened its access to the town. Found out today its even smaller than Aitaroun. The Israeli army murdered several Hezbullah hereos, in the now fully besieged town. The Israeli attack on Maaroub town murdered close to a dozen, all women and children
text_zh: 在黎巴嫩情况依然如故，以色列的袭击和大屠杀仍在继续。以色列军队推进到宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）医院区域，并加深了对该镇的进入。今天发现它甚至比艾塔伦（Aitaroun）还要小。以色列军队在现在被完全围困的城镇中谋杀了多名真主党英雄。以色列对马鲁布（Maaroub）镇的袭击造成近十人死亡，全部是妇女和儿童
